title: Review of patient safety across the health and care landscape
body: "This review looked at 6 bodies and how they work within the wider health and care landscape, with a particular focus on patient safety. The 6 bodies were:   the Care Quality Commission the National Guardian’s Office Healthwatch England and the Local Healthwatch network the Health Services Safety Investigations Body the Patient Safety Commissioner NHS Resolution   Dr Dash’s 9 recommendations focus on streamlining the patient safety landscape and improving accountability. "
